description: Style NoteBright espadrille wedges for the summer from cobblerz with a handmade leatherette upper. This pretty colour pop pair epitomizes classic Parisian style inspired from the sunny coasts and beaches. Unfreeze those pastel hues with this delectable shoes for a balanced vibe this summer. Elevate your warm weather wardrobe with this stylish pair - we at the myntra office especially love the multicolouring on the wedge sides. Buy now before we're all sold out of this lovely style!Heel: 3.75"Product DetailsWedge sandals with bkue, pink and brown forefoot straps that connect to the ankle strapsAnkle straps culminate at the heel collar which has a zip closureHemp styling on the wedge with mutlicolouringTPU outsole with an upraised heelMaterial and CareLeatheretteUse a leather brush and conditioner to clean this product
